violations.description: Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors including in walk ins need cleaned.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Slicer and inside front cooler need cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Step stool, ladder and low shelving in back area need cleaned.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not clean or kept in good repair. -Floors in both restrooms need cleaned.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)

Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
